subject: FW:
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Landon Thomas [mailto:landont@nytimes.com] 
Sent: Friday, September 28, 2007 2:22 PM
To: Helen Kim
Subject: 

Hi Jeffrey.

I saw in NY Post today that Connolly is waiting for your court
appearance 
to go with his VF piece. I have already talked to Howard about the 
importance of getting out ahead of the likes of VF. He said he would
speak 
to your lawyers. Before I get a glimpse of the legal material, I was 
thinking that I should at least start calling around to people who know 
you. Again to focus on the business and scientific/philanthropic aspect
of 
the piece. Could I start to do that -- call people like Larry Summers,
Jess 
Staley, George Mitchell, Ehud Barak, Bill Richardson and others?

Hope you are holding up okay -- and I really think we need to move on
this.

Landon
